	}
	else_if = { limit = { scope:building_type = building_type:windmill }
		value = lsq_get_construction_cost_adjustment_for_windmill
	}
	else_if = { limit = { scope:building_type = building_type:winery }
		value = lsq_get_construction_cost_adjustment_for_winery
	}
	else_if = { limit = { scope:building_type = building_type:winery_manufactory }
		value = lsq_get_construction_cost_adjustment_for_winery_manufactory
	}
	else_if = { limit = { scope:building_type = building_type:wisselbank }
		value = lsq_get_construction_cost_adjustment_for_wisselbank
	}
	else_if = { limit = { scope:building_type = building_type:woodhenge_of_cahokia }
		value = lsq_get_construction_cost_adjustment_for_woodhenge_of_cahokia
	}
	else_if = { limit = { scope:building_type = building_type:yakata }
		value = lsq_get_construction_cost_adjustment_for_yakata
	}
	else_if = { limit = { scope:building_type = building_type:yamashiro }
		value = lsq_get_construction_cost_adjustment_for_yamashiro
	}
	else_if = { limit = { scope:building_type = building_type:zazzau_walls }
		value = lsq_get_construction_cost_adjustment_for_zazzau_walls
	}
	else_if = { limit = { scope:building_type = building_type:zeeland_admiralty }
		value = lsq_get_construction_cost_adjustment_for_zeeland_admiralty
	}
	else_if = { limit = { scope:building_type = building_type:zhixian }
		value = lsq_get_construction_cost_adjustment_for_zhixian
	}
	else_if = { limit = { scope:building_type = building_type:zwinger }
		value = lsq_get_construction_cost_adjustment_for_zwinger
	}
	else = {
		value = 0
	}
}

# Expects scopes: location
lsq_get_construction_cost_adjustment_for_ablaq_palace = {
	value = 0
	add = {
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		value = lsq_get_construction_good_adjustment
		multiply = 0.5
		divide = 0.5
		min = -0.33
		max = 0.33
	}
	divide = 1
}

	add = {
		goods:horses = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		value = lsq_get_construction_good_adjustment
		multiply = 0.15
		divide = 1.1
		min = -0.33
		max = 0.33
	}
	add = {
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		value = lsq_get_construction_good_adjustment
		multiply = 0.2
		divide = 1.1
		min = -0.33
		max = 0.33
	}
	add = {
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		value = lsq_get_construction_good_adjustment
		multiply = 0.5
		divide = 1.1
		min = -0.33
		max = 0.33
	}
	add = {
		goods:wheat = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		value = lsq_get_construction_good_adjustment
		multiply = 0.25
		divide = 1.1
		min = -0.33
		max = 0.33
	}
	divide = 4
}

		value = lsq_get_construction_good_adjustment
		multiply = 0.1
		divide = 0.2
		min = -0.33
		max = 0.33
	}
	divide = 2
}
